title: WTF Whats the deal with this EoE pic
display_title: WTF Whats the deal with this EoE pic
summary: []: WTF? What's the deal with this EoE pic?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 28, 2007 7:06 pm So I was downloading some Eva pics and I noticed this, it's from EoE during the P3II sequence, when there's a revision of sorts of 15's kiss scene ("the kiss becomes a kick"...ZOMG): Now where the hell is Shinji? Is this just a drawing error, or is it emphaizing the fact he and the others are Tanged

chunks.content:
Article: WTF Whats the deal with this EoE pic
[]: WTF? What's the deal with this EoE pic?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 28, 2007 7:06 pm So I was downloading some Eva pics and I noticed this, it's from EoE during the P3II sequence, when there's a revision of sorts of 15's kiss scene ("the kiss becomes a kick"...ZOMG): Now where the hell is Shinji? Is this just a drawing error, or is it emphaizing the fact he and the others are Tanged (if so, what's Misato doing looking all, um, visble and un-Tanged?)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Feb 28, 2007 7:38 pm That's a rehash from episode 15 when Asuka asked to use Misato's perfume. This is why I say the P3II sequences aren't straight retakes.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 01, 2007 2:55 pm I see. Good point to make that it's NOT just a straight retake of that. ^^; eg, in that sequence, I'm pretty sure Shinji is still wearing this shirt (in both this rehash as well as the coffepot scene one) : /nitpick Isn't it 15 rehash, personal hell traincar, then 24' rehash ("Kaji-san's not here anymore!")?? ....Ugh, my brain's on an extended vacation today.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 01, 2007 3:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Isn't it 15 rehash, personal hell traincar, then 24' rehash ("Kaji-san's not here anymore!")??

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Mar 01, 2007 3:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I see. Good point to make that it's NOT just a straight retake of that. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 01, 2007 9:57 pm :shock: WTF? All I gotta say in RE. (Although I thought that Asuka & Misato have a shirt that looks similar? Unless I'm tripping...)

[]:

Article: WTF Whats the deal with this EoE pic
 2007 9:57 pm :shock: WTF? All I gotta say in RE. (Although I thought that Asuka & Misato have a shirt that looks similar? Unless I'm tripping...)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Mar 01, 2007 10:02 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: (Although I thought that Asuka & Misato have a shirt that looks similar? Unless I'm tripping...)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 02, 2007 1:08 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I guess she could have more than one or something but it's still rather odd.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Mar 02, 2007 1:47 pm My point is Misato is involved in this, even though she has no place in the scene because she was out on her date with Kaji. This isn't a flashback, it's character interaction with the environment being shaped by past events. There's much more happening here than the scenes get credit for, and they don't get the analysis the deserve because of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Mar 02, 2007 2:43 pm Character interactions based on things in the past also reminds me of the Misato's college days "flashback"... At least we get interactions on that in both EoTV and EoE. ^^; And I was going somewhere with this, but I blanked out suddenly. *sigh*

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Tue Mar 06, 2007 5:48 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: My point is Misato is involved in this, even though she has no place in the scene because she was out on her date with Kaji. This isn't a flashback, it's character interaction with the environment being shaped by past events. There's much more happening here than the scenes get credit for, and they don't get the analysis the deserve because of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Mar 06, 2007 7:42 am zeaven wrote: My guess would be that it's just several memories being mashed together and forming some kind of amalgamation of them all. Complementation is jumbled and chaotic, and

Article: WTF Whats the deal with this EoE pic
 Tue Mar 06, 2007 7:42 am zeaven wrote: My guess would be that it's just several memories being mashed together and forming some kind of amalgamation of them all. Complementation is jumbled and chaotic, and so is the visual representation of it that we get. After all, the characters are saying different lines than the ones they said originally with those art frames.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Tue Mar 06, 2007 10:48 pm That was an interesting change to the scene IMO, but very well done
